title: Cluster-level architectural abstraction
description:
- The responsibility of this cluster is to provide a way to aggregate values in a generic manner.
- The components in this cluster collaborate by calling each other's methods to perform the aggregation.
- The quality attribute of this cluster is to be scalable, as it can handle large amounts of data.
- The technologies used in this cluster include Java, Maven, and JUnit.
raw_response:
TITLE: Cluster-level architectural abstraction

DESCRIPTION:
- The responsibility of this cluster is to provide a way to aggregate values in a generic manner.
- The components in this cluster collaborate by calling each other's methods to perform the aggregation.
- The quality attribute of this cluster is to be scalable, as it can handle large amounts of data.
- The technologies used in this cluster include Java, Maven, and JUnit.
